approvals.summary: Test: Lagoon X3 promo caption (approval system test)
approvals.content:
🏎️ Experience the ultimate adrenaline rush in Tulum.

Can-Am Maverick X3 — the most powerful side-by-side on the market. Rip through the jungle, conquer the dunes, and feel what real performance feels like.

Book your ride with Lagoon Company. Limited slots daily. 

📍 Tulum, Mexico
🔗 thelagooncompany.mx

#Tulum #CanAm #X3 #ATV #Adventure #Mexico

approvals.summary: Test approval - Lagoon Instagram Reel caption
approvals.content:
The jungle called. We answered with 200hp.

Can-Am X3 through the Tulum backroads. No script. No filter. Just pure adrenaline.

Book your ride: thelagooncompany.mx

#Tulum #CanAm #X3 #Adventure

_schema.agent: string - agent name (e.g. Piia, Mara, Kat)
_schema.type: string - content type (e.g. social_post, ad_copy, report, deployment, goal)
_schema.summary: string - short description of what's being approved
_schema.timestamp: ISO8601 - when the approval was created
_schema.topic_id: number - Telegram topic ID where approval was posted
_schema.reason: string - rejection reason or revision notes (filled after action)
_schema.resolved_at: ISO8601 - when the approval was actioned
